channel.title: Nazarov Berdi — Writing
channel.description: Thoughts on frontend craft, the Vue / Vite ecosystem, and developer tooling.

item.title: Configuring Zed for Vue 3 development
item.description: Zed is fast, but its Vue 3 and TypeScript setup needs a few deliberate choices before it stops fighting you.

item.title: Designing prose that fits the site
item.description: Markdown should stay simple, while the website owns typography, spacing, and code block presentation.
